{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "PR / Communication Lead",
  "description": "SmartStream is a recruitment and outsourcing firm focused on helping businesses find, verify, and manage the right talent. We deliver efficient, scalable workforce solutions that drive productivity and growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: PR / Communication Lead

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	We are seeking a highly creative and strategic PR/Communications Lead to drive brand storytelling, campaign ideation, and client communications across multiple accounts.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing compelling communication concepts, leading creative brief executions, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful campaigns that meet client objectives.
	This role requires a strong understanding of public relations, brand communications, content strategy, and agency operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead the development and execution of creative and communication briefs for clients on a weekly basis.
	Generate innovative concepts, campaign ideas, and communication strategies aligned with client objectives and brand positioning.
	Champion storytelling across all projects, ensuring content is engaging, consistent, and impactful.
	Collaborate closely with Copywriting, Creative, Media, Social Media, Communications, and Media Buying teams to deliver integrated campaigns.
	Develop PR and communication strategies for FMCG, corporate, entertainment, and other client accounts.
	Review and refine communication materials, ensuring quality, accuracy, and brand consistency.
	Manage multiple client briefs simultaneously while meeting deadlines and maintaining high creative standards.
	Support client presentations, campaign pitches, and proposal development.
	Monitor industry trends, consumer insights, and competitor activities to inform communication strategies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and internal stakeholders.
	Measure and evaluate campaign performance, providing recommendations for continuous improvement.
	Mentor and guide junior team members where required.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Marketing, Communications, Journalism, English, or any related discipline.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience in an advertising, marketing communications, PR, or creative agency environment.
	Proven experience managing communication campaigns for FMCG, entertainment, corporate, or related sectors.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating creative communication, storytelling, campaign development, and content strategy.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to conceptualize and execute innovative communication ideas from brief to delivery.
	Experience leading and managing multiple client briefs simultaneously within a collaborative team environment.
	Strong understanding of media relations, brand communications, digital communications, and content marketing.
	Ability to work under pressure, prioritize tasks, and meet tight deadlines.
	Strong presentation, stakeholder management, and client-facing skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and familiarity with communication and project management tools.
	Highly creative, detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven.


Salary
N300,000 &ndash; N400,000 (Net) monthly

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: smartstream.hires@outlook.com using the Job Positiion as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-03",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SmartStream"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

}



PR / Communication Lead Job at SmartStream




        
    

        
        SmartStream is a recruitment and outsourcing firm focused on helping businesses find, verify, and manage the right talent. We deliver efficient, scalable workforce solutions that drive productivity and growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: PR / Communication Lead

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly creative and strategic PR/Communications Lead to drive brand storytelling, campaign ideation, and client communications across multiple accounts.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing compelling communication concepts, leading creative brief executions, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful campaigns that meet client objectives.
	This role requires a strong understanding of public relations, brand communications, content strategy, and agency operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead the development and execution of creative and communication briefs for clients on a weekly basis.
	Generate innovative concepts, campaign ideas, and communication strategies aligned with client objectives and brand positioning.
	Champion storytelling across all projects, ensuring content is engaging, consistent, and impactful.
	Collaborate closely with Copywriting, Creative, Media, Social Media, Communications, and Media Buying teams to deliver integrated campaigns.
	Develop PR and communication strategies for FMCG, corporate, entertainment, and other client accounts.
	Review and refine communication materials, ensuring quality, accuracy, and brand consistency.
	Manage multiple client briefs simultaneously while meeting deadlines and maintaining high creative standards.
	Support client presentations, campaign pitches, and proposal development.
	Monitor industry trends, consumer insights, and competitor activities to inform communication strategies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and internal stakeholders.
	Measure and evaluate campaign performance, providing recommendations for continuous improvement.
	Mentor and guide junior team members where required.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Marketing, Communications, Journalism, English, or any related discipline.
	2–3 years of experience in an advertising, marketing communications, PR, or creative agency environment.
	Proven experience managing communication campaigns for FMCG, entertainment, corporate, or related sectors.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating creative communication, storytelling, campaign development, and content strategy.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to conceptualize and execute innovative communication ideas from brief to delivery.
	Experience leading and managing multiple client briefs simultaneously within a collaborative team environment.
	Strong understanding of media relations, brand communications, digital communications, and content marketing.
	Ability to work under pressure, prioritize tasks, and meet tight deadlines.
	Strong presentation, stakeholder management, and client-facing skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and familiarity with communication and project management tools.
	Highly creative, detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven.


Salary
N300,000 – N400,000 (Net) monthly

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Positiion as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "HR Officer",
  "description": "Marvel Advisory is a recruitment agency that was founded in 2018 by a team of Human Resources and Business Consultants with the aim of transforming the workforce by inspiring productivity, effectiveness, value driven and innovative teams across businesses in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer
Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday &ndash; Friday

Job Summary


	Are you a seasoned HR professional with a passion for managing people, processes, and client relationships?
	We are looking for an experienced HR Executive to join our team and oversee HR operations for a portfolio of clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end HR operations for assigned clients
	Coordinate recruitment, onboarding, and employee lifecycle activities
	Serve as the primary HR contact for client accounts
	Provide guidance on HR policies, procedures, and best practices
	Handle employee relations matters and workplace concerns
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR documentation
	Prepare HR reports and provide regular updates to clients
	Support performance management and employee engagement initiatives
	Ensure compliance with applicable labor laws and company policies


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in Human Resources
	Experience managing HR functions for multiple teams or clients is an added advantage
	Strong understanding of HR operations and employee relations
	Excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: marvelrecruitment7@gmail.com using &quot;HR Executive&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

HR Officer Job at Marvel Advisory




        
    

        
        Marvel Advisory is a recruitment agency that was founded in 2018 by a team of Human Resources and Business Consultants with the aim of transforming the workforce by inspiring productivity, effectiveness, value driven and innovative teams across businesses in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer
Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday – Friday

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a seasoned HR professional with a passion for managing people, processes, and client relationships?
	We are looking for an experienced HR Executive to join our team and oversee HR operations for a portfolio of clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end HR operations for assigned clients
	Coordinate recruitment, onboarding, and employee lifecycle activities
	Serve as the primary HR contact for client accounts
	Provide guidance on HR policies, procedures, and best practices
	Handle employee relations matters and workplace concerns
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR documentation
	Prepare HR reports and provide regular updates to clients
	Support performance management and employee engagement initiatives
	Ensure compliance with applicable labor laws and company policies


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in Human Resources
	Experience managing HR functions for multiple teams or clients is an added advantage
	Strong understanding of HR operations and employee relations
	Excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR Executive" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "An Education Consulting and Edtech Company is recruiting to fill the position below:

	We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, intelligent, and resourceful Executive Virtual Assistant to work directly with the Founder of two growing businesses operating in education consulting and edtech.

	Experienced Virtual Assistants
	Executive Assistants
	Project Coordinators
	Operations Assistants

	Digital Marketing Assistants

Key Responsibilities
Executive Support:

	Maintain task management systems


Grant Research &amp; Application Support:

	Track application deadlines and submissions


Content Creation Support:

	Assist with content planning and scheduling
	Repurpose content across platforms
	Support YouTube and LinkedIn content production


Basic Video Editing &amp; Design Support:


	Edit short-form and long-form videos and reels
	Add captions and simple graphics
	Create basic Canva designs
	Organize content assets and media libraries


Research &amp; Special Projects:


	Conduct market research
	Competitor analysis
	Lead generation
	Vendor sourcing
	Special business projects assigned by the CEO


AI &amp; Productivity Tools:


	Use ChatGPT and other AI tools effectively
	Assist with automation and workflow improvement
	Learn and implement new software quickly


Required Skills

	Excellent written and spoken English

	Strong online research skills

	Zoom and virtual collaboration tools


Preferred Skills:


	Content writing

	CRM experience
	Project management tools


Personal Qualities
We are looking for someone who is:


	Proactive

	Curious and eager to learn

	Able to think ahead and anticipate needs
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

	Projects move forward consistently
	Tasks are tracked and completed accurately
	Content is produced on schedule
	Opportunities and problems are identified early
	The CEO spends less time managing tasks and more time focusing on strategy.


Compensation
Competitive and based on experience, skill level, and availability.

Executive Virtual Assistant & Project Coordinator Job at Education Consulting and Edtech Company




        
    

        
        An Education Consulting and Edtech Company is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Virtual Assistant & Project Coordinator

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Part-Time (with potential to become Full-Time)

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, intelligent, and resourceful Executive Virtual Assistant to work directly with the Founder of two growing businesses operating in education consulting and edtech.
	You will become the CEO's right hand, helping to manage projects, keep priorities on track, support content creation for her personal brand, assist with grant applications, conduct market research, and help execute strategic initiatives.
	The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys taking ownership, solving problems independently, learning quickly, and helping ambitious projects move forward.


Who This Role Is Perfect For


	Experienced Virtual Assistants
	Executive Assistants
	Project Coordinators
	Operations Assistants
	Administrative Professionals
	Digital Marketing Assistants
	Ambitious graduates looking to grow into operations and leadership roles


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support:


	Manage schedules, appointments, and reminders
	Track priorities and follow up on action items
	Organize files, documents, and business records
	Prepare meeting notes and action summaries
	Maintain project trackers and dashboards


Business Operations Support:


	Liaise with key staff across two businesses
	Monitor progress of ongoing projects
	Follow up with team members and contractors
	Assist in implementing SOPs and systems
	Maintain task management systems


Grant Research & Application Support:


	Research grant opportunities
	Compile application requirements
	Assist with proposal preparation
	Gather supporting documentation
	Track application deadlines and submissions


Content Creation Support:


	Research content ideas
	Draft blog posts, emails, newsletters, and social media content
	Assist with content planning and scheduling
	Repurpose content across platforms
	Support YouTube and LinkedIn content production


Basic Video Editing & Design Support:


	Edit short-form and long-form videos and reels
	Add captions and simple graphics
	Create basic Canva designs
	Organize content assets and media libraries


Research & Special Projects:


	Conduct market research
	Competitor analysis
	Lead generation
	Vendor sourcing
	Special business projects assigned by the CEO


AI & Productivity Tools:


	Use ChatGPT and other AI tools effectively
	Assist with automation and workflow improvement
	Learn and implement new software quickly


Required Skills
Essential:


	Excellent written and spoken English
	Strong organizational skills
	Outstanding attention to detail
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
	Strong online research skills
	Professional communication skills
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


Technical Skills:


	Google Workspace
	Zoho
	Microsoft Office
	Canva
	ChatGPT, Claude AI or AI productivity tools
	Zoom and virtual collaboration tools


Preferred Skills:


	Content writing
	Copywriting
	Email marketing
	Basic video editing
	Social media management
	CRM experience
	Project management tools


Personal Qualities
We are looking for someone who is:


	Proactive
	Highly dependable
	Resourceful
	Detail-oriented
	Curious and eager to learn
	Professional and discreet
	Able to think ahead and anticipate needs
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment


Success in This Role Looks Like:


	Deadlines are met without constant reminders
	Projects move forward consistently
	Tasks are tracked and completed accurately
	Content is produced on schedule
	Opportunities and problems are identified early
	The CEO spends less time managing tasks and more time focusing on strategy.


Compensation
Competitive and based on experience, skill level, and availability.


Note: Kindly ensure all application instructions are followed, as incomplete applications may not be considered.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "Pointone Microfinance Bank provides tailored financial solutions with competitive interest rates, flexible repayment structures, and seamless banking services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Drive customer acquisition and business growth.
	Mobilize deposits and market the bank&#39;s products and services.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and prospects.
	Generate quality leads and convert them into active customers.
	Meet assigned sales and deposit mobilization targets.
	Conduct market visits and promote the bank&#39;s products within assigned locations.
	Gather market intelligence and provide feedback on customer needs and competitor activities.
	Contribute to the achievement of branch and organizational growth objectives.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Marketing, Sales, Business Development, or a related role.
	HND/Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, or any related field.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to meet and exceed assigned targets.
	Experience in banking or microfinance is an added advantage.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and customer-focused.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@pointonemfb.com.ng using &quot;Application for Marketing Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Marketer Job at Pointone Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Pointone Microfinance Bank provides tailored financial solutions with competitive interest rates, flexible repayment structures, and seamless banking services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive customer acquisition and business growth.
	Mobilize deposits and market the bank's products and services.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and prospects.
	Generate quality leads and convert them into active customers.
	Meet assigned sales and deposit mobilization targets.
	Conduct market visits and promote the bank's products within assigned locations.
	Gather market intelligence and provide feedback on customer needs and competitor activities.
	Contribute to the achievement of branch and organizational growth objectives.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Marketing, Sales, Business Development, or a related role.
	HND/Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, or any related field.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to meet and exceed assigned targets.
	Experience in banking or microfinance is an added advantage.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and customer-focused.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Marketing Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Whip-smart Service Provider Limited has two offices across Nigeria (Lagos and Port-harcourt) with her head office in Lagos. Our services are considerably more affordable to most healthcare providers. We ensure that clients receive the very best standard of care and support that match their care needs, preferences and lifestyle in their various homes. We are passionate about our clients right to receive the highest quality of care in the comfort, security and familiarity of their own homes. Our staff are carefully selected, medically tested and screened by special security company. We take personal and professional references and look for staff with previous experience in our line of business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant

Job Location: Egbeda, Lagos
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Summary


	The Junior Accountant will support the finance department by managing daily financial activities related to the movement of goods, processing financial transactions, preparing reports, and ensuring proper financial documentation and compliance.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily financial transactions related to the movement of goods.
	Process and record financial transactions accurately.
	Prepare and maintain financial reports and records.
	Reconcile invoices, receipts, and other financial documents.
	Perform cost analysis on goods and supply chain activities,
	Ensure proper financial documentation and compliance with company policies.
	Assist with inventory-related financial tracking.
	Support the accounting team with other financial duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Banking & Finance, or a related field.
	Strong financial management and analytical skills.
	Good understanding of supply chain operations.
	Excellent communication and problem-solving abilities.
	Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.


Salary Range
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.
